scores.statement: A pyridine small-molecule inhibitor selectively passivates a-SiN -NH sites, enabling BDEAS-based SiOx growth on a-SiO2 to >=90% selectivity at 10 nm.
A methanesulfonic acid (MSA) inhibitor selectively passivates a-SiN sites, enabling Si(OEt)4-based SiOx growth on a-SiO2 to >=90% selectivity at 10 nm.
